query:
SELECT title, COUNT(*) as count
FROM lessons 
WHERE courseId = 600000
GROUP BY title
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT title, COUNT(*) as count
